JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-28-19

Motion To Compel Defendant Adam Gonzales Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LYNCH's Motion To Compel Defendant Adam Gonzales' Responses To Discovery, as follows:

Plaintiff's motion to compel defendant's response to plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production of Documents is unopposed and granted. The defendant shall provide verified responses, without objection, to said discovery pleadings within twenty days of service of a copy of the Order with Notice of Entry. Plaintiff's motion to deem Request for Admissions, Set One, admitted is unopposed and granted. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the sum of $810.00 as against defendant's attorney to be paid within the aforesaid twenty days.

Court to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
